# Resident Evil HD Remaster

name: Biohazard Remaster: Hit Anywhere
mode: once
w32 003D2900 4E800020

name: Biohazard Remaster: Infinite Health
mode: once
w32 00A52134 807F13AC
w32 00A52138 2C030000
w32 00A5213C 4182000C

w32 00A52144 907F13AC
w32 00A52148 4B5FBD04
w32 0004DE48 48A042EC
